home.title: 🕉️ Atha Yoga-Anuśāsanam 🪔
home.start_yoga_title: Daily Yoga 🧘‍♂️ - Find Your Inner Peace
home.start_yoga_quote: "Yogaḥ chitta-vṛtti-nirodhaḥ" / "Yoga is the cessation of the fluctuations of the mind" — Maharishi Patanjali

asanas_list_details.notice_message: Practice at your own pace and listen to your body. Beginners may take longer and may not do the poses perfectly. Do what you can, and with regular practice your body will gain flexibility and improve naturally.
